daily_take.deck: López Aliaga tanked 27.5 points in 24 hours on $4M volume, landing at 16.5%. The collapse signals either panic or information. Peru's political establishment just moved against him, and the market front-ran it. At these odds, you're buying a comeback candidate at fire-sale prices, but the structural headwinds are real. This is a fade-the-bounce setup until we see proof the momentum reverses.
